task_completion.description: Diagram includes Supplier, Customer, and Production Control boxes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for boxes at the top of the diagram labeled 'Michigan Steel Co.' (Supplier), 'State Street Assembly' (Customer), and a central 'Production Control' box.

task_completion.description: Diagram includes the five specified process steps with data boxes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for five distinct process boxes labeled 'Stamping', 'Welding I', 'Welding II', 'Assembly I', and 'Assembly II'. Each must have a data box underneath it containing metrics (like C/T).

task_completion.description: Diagram includes inventory triangles and push material flow arrows
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for triangle symbols (often containing an 'I') located between the process steps, and striped or thick arrows indicating 'Push' material flow connecting the processes.

task_completion.description: Diagram includes electronic and manual information flow arrows
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for lightning bolt-shaped arrows (representing electronic flow) and straight/thin arrows (representing manual flow) connecting the Production Control box to the Supplier, Customer, and process steps.

task_completion.description: Diagram includes a timeline ladder at the bottom showing Value Added vs Non-Value Added time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a castellated line (stair-step timeline) at the bottom of the diagram with time values written above (non-value added/lead time) and below (value added/processing time) the line.

task_completion.description: Diagram includes a summary text box with calculated times, and the required files are saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text box summarizing 'Total Production Lead Time' and 'Total Processing Time' (Processing time should be 187 seconds). Also verify the presence of 'acme_vsm.png' and 'acme_vsm.drawio' on the Desktop or in a file explorer window.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io (diagrams.net) graphical interface to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the draw.io application open with the VSM being actively constructed using its shape libraries and canvas.

integrity.description: The agent exported the files using the application rather than spoofing them
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog boxes in draw.io being used to save the .drawio and .png files to the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply download a pre-made VSM image and rename it
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of step-by-step diagram construction (e.g., placing individual shapes, typing text) rather than a sudden appearance of a fully completed diagram.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Total Processing Time is 187 seconds (sum of cycle times: 1s, 38s, 46s, 62s, 40s). Inventory quantities between steps are 4600, 1100, 1600, 1200, and 2700. The expected output files are 'acme_vsm.drawio' and 'acme_vsm.png' saved to the Desktop.
